source.title: Applied Cognitive Task Analysis (ACTA) Methodology
source.publisher: Navy Personnel Research and Development Center

extraction.method: Internet Archive full-document OCR text paired with its byte-identical DTIC scan mirror; direct pdftotext produced no usable text because the 193-page report is image-only
verified_regions: title, report metadata, and abstract at extraction start
body and instructional taxonomy in extraction middle
ACTA software-review forms and distribution list at extraction end
extraction.quality_notes: The OCR preserves the complete report sequence and is readable, but inserts spaces between many words and flattens tables. Important quotations and table values should be checked against the scanned PDF pages.
extraction.source_access_notes: DTIC's canonical PDF endpoint returned HTTP 429 after retries. The PDF and OCR were acquired from the Internet Archive DTIC mirror; title, report number, accession, page count, and sampled beginning/middle/end content were verified. This is acquired source evidence, not a deep review.
